summary.notes: Heuristic parsing matched no trainers on last run; many trainers not found in workbook using current name matching. A previous verification flagged Commander Saturn entries with oversized move lists.

previous_issues.backup_conflict: Previous run failed to write because data/trainer_db.json.bak already existed (FileExistsError).

recommendations: Rename or archive existing data/trainer_db.json.bak (or allow script to use timestamped backups) and re-run the sync to persist changes.
Run a looser fuzzy match (token overlap threshold) to find more trainer rows, or provide a manual mapping file for unmatched trainers.
Apply targeted fixes for known problematic trainers (Commander Saturn, Cyrus) using parsed snippets, then re-run verification.
Produce a full verification report after re-run including modified trainers, trainers not found, and any mons with >4 moves.

next_actions.B_manual_mapping: Provide mapping file of trainer name -> sheet cell reference for unmatched trainers.
next_actions.C_targeted_fixes: Apply targeted JSON patches for Commander Saturn and Cyrus from spreadsheet snippets.
